description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a boxy, utilitarian design and a matte black finish. The weapon features a rectangular receiver with a prominent magazine well extending downward, housing a long, straight box magazine. The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front of the receiver, and is accompanied by simple iron sights mounted on the top. A folding metal stock is attached to the rear, designed for stability during firing but can be collapsed for portability. The grip is integrated into the lower receiver, and a trigger guard is clearly visible. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal, and the design is optimized for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a boxy receiver, folding metal stock, and a long box magazine. It features a short cylindrical barrel and simple iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the receiver, folding metal stock, grip, and the protruding box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short cylindrical barrel, front iron sight, and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, folding stock, and the magazine, with additional detail on the receiver's markings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, rear iron sight, and the alignment of the folding stock.
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple notch rear sight with fixed front post
